ru: Speed up tier progression by earning 5x more League Points for the next {1} hours!
fr: Montez de rang plus rapidement en gagnant 3x plus de points de ligue pour les prochaines {1} heures !
en: Speed up tier progression by earning 5x more League Points for the next {1} hours!
sch: 在接下来的{1} 小时内通过获得3倍以上的联赛点数来加速阶层的提升。
pt: Acelere a progressão do nivel ganhando 3x mais Pontos da Liga pelas proximas {1} horas!
tr: Speed up tier progression by earning 5x more League Points for the next {1} hours!
de: Beschleunige Stufen Progression, indem du 3x mehr Liga Punkte den nächsten {1} Stunden verdienst!
ko: Speed up tier progression by earning 5x more League Points for the next {1} hours!
it: Accelera l'aumento di classe guadagnando Punti Lega extra x3 per le prossime {1} ore!
jp: Speed up tier progression by earning 5x more League Points for the next {1} hours!
tch: Speed up tier progression by earning 5x more League Points for the next {1} hours!
es: ¡Acelera tu acenso por los rangos al ganar 3x más puntos de liga durante las siguientes {1} horas!
test_longest: Montez de rang plus rapidement en gagnant 3x plus de points de ligue pour les prochaines {1} heures !
Ganhou o refoço do seus Pontos da Liga!

ru: Data not allowed. Please review your text.

ko: Data not allowed. Please review your text.
it: Dati non consentiti. Rivedi il testo.
jp: Data not allowed. Please review your text.
tch: Data not allowed. Please review your text.

ru: Looking good, rookie. Keep it up and maybe you'll be a champion like me someday!
fr: C'est la grande forme, l'ami. Continuez comme ça, et vous deviendrez un champion tout comme moi, un de ces jours !
en: Looking good, rookie. Keep it up and maybe you'll be a champion like me someday!
sch: 干得不错新来的，保持这股劲头，也许将来有一天你也会成为像我一样的冠军呢！
pt: Está bonito, recruta. Continue assim e talvez, um dia, você será um campeão como eu!
tr: Looking good, rookie. Keep it up and maybe you'll be a champion like me someday!
de: Du siehst gut aus, Frischling. Mach so weiter und vielleicht wirst du mal ein Profi, so wie ich!
ko: Looking good, rookie. Keep it up and maybe you'll be a champion like me someday!
it: Non male, novellino. Tieni duro e forse un giorno diventerai un campione come me!
jp: Looking good, rookie. Keep it up and maybe you'll be a champion like me someday!
tch: Looking good, rookie. Keep it up and maybe you'll be a champion like me someday!
es: Se te da bien, novato. ¡Si sigues así, algún día te convertirás en un campeón como yo!
test_longest: C'est la grande forme, l'ami. Continuez comme ça, et vous deviendrez un champion tout comme moi, un de ces jours !

ru: Our contestant has earned another new vehicle!
fr: Notre concurrent a acquis un autre nouveau véhicule !
en: Our contestant has earned another new vehicle!
sch: 我们的对手获得了一个新的载具！
pt: Nosso participante ganhou outro veículo novo!

tch: Our contestant has earned another new vehicle!
es: ¡Nuestro concursante se ha ganado un nuevo vehículo!
test_longest: Unser Herausforderer hat ein weiteres neues Fahrzeug verdient!

ru: Very nice! Lots of first strike on this unit.
fr: Très bien ! Beaucoup de premières frappes dans cette unité.
en: Very nice! Lots of first strike on this unit.
sch: 干得漂亮！精彩的首次突袭。

de: Sehr schön! Eine Menge Erstschläge auf diese Einheit.
ko: Very nice! Lots of first strike on this unit.
it: Bellissimo! Molti Primo Fuoco su questa unità!

fr: J'ai aussi quelque chose d'autre pour vous.

jp: I've also got something else for you.
tch: I've also got something else for you.
es: También tengo otra cosa para ti.

ru: A mystery box. Break it open to see what's inside!
fr: Une boîte mystère. Ouvrez-la pour voir ce qu'il y a à l'intérieur !

ru: Let's see another battle out of this team tonight!

tch: Let's see another battle out of this team tonight!

ru: This costs two ability points but does direct damage before your tanks attack!
fr: Cela coûte deux points d'action, mais effectue des dégâts directs avant que vos tanks n'attaquent.
en: This costs two ability points but does direct damage before your tanks attack!
sch: 这会消耗两个能力点数但是可以在你的坦克攻击前就造成直接伤害！
pt: Ela custa dois pontos de ação, mas causa dano direto antes do ataque de seu tanque!
tr: This costs two ability points but does direct damage before your tanks attack!
de: Das kostet zwei Aktionspunkte aber richtet direkten Schaden an, bevor dein Panzer angreift!
ko: This costs two ability points but does direct damage before your tanks attack!
it: Questa costa due punti azione, ma infligge un danno diretto prima che i tuoi carri attacchino.
jp: This costs two ability points but does direct damage before your tanks attack!
tch: This costs two ability points but does direct damage before your tanks attack!
es: ¡Esto cuesta dos puntos de acción pero inflige daño directo antes de que tus tanques ataquen!
test_longest: Cela coûte deux points d'action, mais effectue des dégâts directs avant que vos tanks n'attaquent.

ru: Building it will take a moment.
fr: Le construire prendra un certain temps.
en: Building it will take a moment.
sch: 制造它需要花费一点时间。
tr: Building it will take a moment.
de: Das zu bauen dauert eine Weile.
ko: Building it will take a moment.
it: Per costruire ci vorrà un attimo.
jp: Building it will take a moment.
tch: Building it will take a moment.
test_longest: Le construire prendra un certain temps.

ru: That'll make a nice addition to your team.
fr: Ce sera un bon ajout à votre équipe.
en: That'll make a nice addition to your team.
sch: 这会让你的队伍锦上添花。
pt: Isso será um bom acréscimo para a  sua equipe.
tr: That'll make a nice addition to your team.
de: Dies wird dein Team prima vervollständigen.
ko: That'll make a nice addition to your team.
it: Questa sarà un'ottima aggiunta per la tua squadra.
jp: That'll make a nice addition to your team.
tch: That'll make a nice addition to your team.
es: Será una adición interesante al equipo.
test_longest: Questa sarà un'ottima aggiunta per la tua squadra.

ru: Tap the menu button in the top left to navigate your way around.
fr: Touchez l'onglet Menu dans le coin supérieur gauche pour naviguer dans le jeu.
en: Tap the menu button in the top left to navigate your way around.
sch: 点击左上方的菜单按钮可以帮助你进行导航。
pt: Clique no botão menu, na parte superior esquerda, para retornar.
tr: Tap the menu button in the top left to navigate your way around.
de: Wähle das Menü oben links, um zu navigieren.
ko: Tap the menu button in the top left to navigate your way around.
it: Tocca il pulsante menu in alto a sinistra per dare un'occhiata in giro.
jp: Tap the menu button in the top left to navigate your way around.
tch: Tap the menu button in the top left to navigate your way around.
es: Toca el botón "Menú" en la esquina superior izquierda para navegar por los menús.
test_longest: Toca el botón "Menú" en la esquina superior izquierda para navegar por los menús.

ru: Heck of a show, rookie! Now, let's build you some better units!
fr: C'est tout un spectacle, l'ami ! Maintenant, fabriquons des unités supérieures !
en: Heck of a show, rookie! Now, let's build you some better units!
sch: 你做得很好新来的！接下来，咱们整点更好的单位吧！
pt: Um show e tanto, recruta! Agora vamos construir algumas unidades melhores para você!
tr: Heck of a show, rookie! Now, let's build you some better units!
de: Was für eine Show, Frischling! Jetzt lass uns dir eine paar bessere Einheiten bauen!
ko: Heck of a show, rookie! Now, let's build you some better units!
it: Che forza, novellino! Ora costruiamo delle unità migliori!
jp: Heck of a show, rookie! Now, let's build you some better units!
tch: Heck of a show, rookie! Now, let's build you some better units!
es: ¡Ha sido increíble, novato! Ahora, construyamos algunas unidades mejores.
test_longest: Was für eine Show, Frischling! Jetzt lass uns dir eine paar bessere Einheiten bauen!

ru: You can build new units by collecting parts.
fr: Vous pouvez fabriquer de nouvelles unités en récupérant des pièces.
en: You can build new units by collecting parts.
sch: 你可以通过收集足够的零件来制造新的单位。
pt: Você pode construir novas unidades ao coletar peças.
tr: You can build new units by collecting parts.
de: Du kannst neue Einheiten durch das Sammeln von Teilen bauen.
ko: You can build new units by collecting parts.
it: Puoi costruire nuove unità collezionando parti.
jp: You can build new units by collecting parts.
tch: You can build new units by collecting parts.
es: Puedes construir nuevas unidades recogiendo partes.
test_longest: Vous pouvez fabriquer de nouvelles unités en récupérant des pièces.

ru: You can find parts by destroying enemy units. The better the unit, the better the part!
fr: Vous pouvez trouver des pièces en détruisant les unités ennemies. Plus l'unité est bonne, meilleures seront les pièces !
en: You can find parts by destroying enemy units. The better the unit, the better the part!
sch: 你可以通过干掉敌人来获得零件，更棒的单位则需要更好的零件！
pt: Você pode encontrar peças ao destruir unidades inimigas. Quanto melhor a unidade, melhor a peça!
tr: You can find parts by destroying enemy units. The better the unit, the better the part!
de: Du findest Teile, wenn du Feindeinheiten zerstörst. Je besser die Einheit, desto besser die Teile.
ko: You can find parts by destroying enemy units. The better the unit, the better the part!
it: Puoi trovare parti distruggendo unità nemiche. Migliore sarà l'unità, migliore sarà la parte.
jp: You can find parts by destroying enemy units. The better the unit, the better the part!
tch: You can find parts by destroying enemy units. The better the unit, the better the part!
es: Puedes encontrar partes destruyendo unidades enemigas. ¡Cuanto mejores sean las unidades, mejores serán las partes!
test_longest: Vous pouvez trouver des pièces en détruisant les unités ennemies. Plus l'unité est bonne, meilleures seront les pièces !

ru: You've already collected some parts, so let's build one now. Tap on the unit to build it.
fr: Vous avez déjà récolté quelques pièces, construisons-en une maintenant. Touchez l'unité pour la construire.
en: You've already collected some parts, so let's build one now. Tap on the unit to build it.
sch: 你已经收集到不少零件了，那咱们现在就造一个吧。点击相应的单位即可制造。
pt: Você já coletou algumas peças, então agora vamos construir. Clique na unidade para construir.
tr: You've already collected some parts, so let's build one now. Tap on the unit to build it.
de: Du hast bereits Teile gesammelt, also lass uns eine Einheit bauen. Wähle eine Einheit aus, um sie zu bauen.
ko: You've already collected some parts, so let's build one now. Tap on the unit to build it.
it: Hai già collezianato alcune parti. Tocca sull'unità per costruirla.
jp: You've already collected some parts, so let's build one now. Tap on the unit to build it.
tch: You've already collected some parts, so let's build one now. Tap on the unit to build it.
es: Ya tienes algunas partes, así que podemos construir una ahora. Toca en la unidad para construirla.
test_longest: Vous avez déjà récolté quelques pièces, construisons-en une maintenant. Touchez l'unité pour la construire.

ru: But first, let's go over the rules!
fr: Mais d'abord, il faut passer les règles en revue !
en: But first, let's go over the rules!
sch: 但是首先，让我们来了解更多的规则吧！
pt: Mas antes, vamos conhecer as regras!
tr: But first, let's go over the rules!
de: Aber als Erstes, lass uns die Regeln anschauen!
ko: But first, let's go over the rules!
it: Ma prima, andiamo a vedere le regole!
jp: But first, let's go over the rules!
tch: But first, let's go over the rules!
test_longest: Mais d'abord, il faut passer les règles en revue !

ru: Each tank has an action bar with five possible ^cf00fattack values.
fr: Chaque tank a une barre d'action avec 5 valeurs possibles d'^cf00fattaque.
en: Each tank has an action bar with five possible ^cf00fattack values.
sch: 每个坦克都有一个行动条并且拥有五次^cf00f攻击机会。
pt: Cada tanque possui uma barra de ação com cinco valores de ^cf00fataque possíveis.
tr: Each tank has an action bar with five possible ^cf00fattack values.
de: Jeder Panzer hat einen Aktionsbalken mit fünf möglichen ^cf00fAngriffswerten.
ko: Each tank has an action bar with five possible ^cf00fattack values.
it: Ogni carro ha una barra d'azione con cinque possibili ^cf00fvalori d'attacco.
jp: Each tank has an action bar with five possible ^cf00fattack values.
tch: Each tank has an action bar with five possible ^cf00fattack values.
es: Cada tanque tiene una barra de acción con cinco posibles  ^cf00fvalores de ataque.
test_longest: Cada tanque tiene una barra de acción con cinco posibles  ^cf00fvalores de ataque.

ru: At the start of each round, each tank will spin a random value.
fr: Au début de chaque tour, chaque tank lance une valeur aléatoire.
en: At the start of each round, each tank will spin a random value.
sch: 在每回合开始的时候，每个坦克将会被分到一个随机的值。
pt: No início de cada rodada, cada tanque irá girar um valor aleatório.
tr: At the start of each round, each tank will spin a random value.
de: Am Anfang jeder Runde, wird jeder Panzer einen zufälligen Wert erdrehen.
ko: At the start of each round, each tank will spin a random value.
it: All'inizio di ogni turno, ogni carro lancerà un valore casuale.
jp: At the start of each round, each tank will spin a random value.
tch: At the start of each round, each tank will spin a random value.
es: Al principio de cada ronda, cada tanque sacará un valor aleatorio.
test_longest: Am Anfang jeder Runde, wird jeder Panzer einen zufälligen Wert erdrehen.

ru: Combatants can use the Re-spin ability to change a tank's action. Let's see it now!
fr: Les concurrents peuvent utiliser le pouvoir de Relance pour modifier l'action d'un tank. Essayons-le maintenant !
en: Combatants can use the Re-spin ability to change a tank's action. Let's see it now!
sch: 参赛者可以使用重组能力来改变坦克的行动，来让我们瞧瞧吧！
pt: Os Participantes podem usar a habilidade de Girar novamente para alterar a ação de um tanque. Vamos ver agora!
tr: Combatants can use the Re-spin ability to change a tank's action. Let's see it now!
de: Herausforderer können die "erneut drehen" Fähigkeit benutzen, um eine Aktion zu ändern. Lass es uns anschauen!
ko: Combatants can use the Re-spin ability to change a tank's action. Let's see it now!
it: I combattenti possono utilizzare l'abilità Rilancia per modificare l'azione di un carro. Vediamolo ora!
jp: Combatants can use the Re-spin ability to change a tank's action. Let's see it now!
tch: Combatants can use the Re-spin ability to change a tank's action. Let's see it now!
es: Los combatientes pueden volver a girar para cambiar la acción del tanque. ¡Veámoslo ahora!
test_longest: Les concurrents peuvent utiliser le pouvoir de Relance pour modifier l'action d'un tank. Essayons-le maintenant !

ru: Much better! Tap "Fight" to start the action!
fr: Beaucoup mieux ! Touchez "À l'attaque" pour débuter l'action !
en: Much better! Tap "Fight" to start the action!
sch: 好多了！点击“战斗”来开始行动吧！
pt: Muito melhor! Clique em "Luta" para iniciar a ação!
tr: Much better! Tap "Fight" to start the action!
de: Viel besser! Wähle "Kampf", um die Aktion zu starten.
ko: Much better! Tap "Fight" to start the action!
it: Molto meglio! Tocca "Combatti" per iniziare l'offensiva!
jp: Much better! Tap "Fight" to start the action!
tch: Much better! Tap "Fight" to start the action!
test_longest: Beaucoup mieux ! Touchez "À l'attaque" pour débuter l'action !

ru: Oooh, this new unit has ^c00ffFirst Strike^c000f capability!
fr: Ooooh, cette nouvelle unité a un pouvoir de ^c00ffPremière Frappe^c000f !
en: Oooh, this new unit has ^c00ffFirst Strike^c000f capability!
sch: 哦～新单位拥有^c00ff首次突袭^c000f的能力！
pt: Oooh, essa nova unidade possui capacidade de ^c00ffPrimeiro Ataque^c000f!
tr: Oooh, this new unit has ^c00ffFirst Strike^c000f capability!
ko: Oooh, this new unit has ^c00ffFirst Strike^c000f capability!
it: Oooh, questa nuova unità ha la capacità di ^c00ffPrimo Fuoco^c000f!
jp: Oooh, this new unit has ^c00ffFirst Strike^c000f capability!
tch: Oooh, this new unit has ^c00ffFirst Strike^c000f capability!
es: ¡Oh, esta nueva unidad tiene la capacidad de realizar un ^c00ffPrimer Ataque^c000f!
test_longest: ¡Oh, esta nueva unidad tiene la capacidad de realizar un ^c00ffPrimer Ataque^c000f!

fr: Les attaques ^c00ffPremières Frappes^c000f sont affichées en bleu.
pt: Os ^c00ffPrimeiros Ataques^c000f são da cor azul.
it: Gli attacchi ^c00ffPrimo Fuoco^c000f sono colorati di blu.
es: Los ataques con ^c00ffPrimer Ataque^c000f están coloreados en azul.
test_longest: Los ataques con ^c00ffPrimer Ataque^c000f están coloreados en azul.

ru: Whichever team has the higher First Strike total will attack first.
fr: L'équipe qui obtient le total de Première Frappe le plus élevé attaquera en premier.
en: Whichever team has the higher First Strike total will attack first.
sch: 拥有更高首次突袭的队伍将会先行攻击。
pt: Qualquer equipe que tiver o maior Primeiro Ataque total irá atacar primeiro.
tr: Whichever team has the higher First Strike total will attack first.
de: Das Team mit dem höheren Erstschlagswert greift zuerst an.
ko: Whichever team has the higher First Strike total will attack first.
it: Il team con il più alto valore totale in Primo Fuoco attaccherà per primo.
jp: Whichever team has the higher First Strike total will attack first.
tch: Whichever team has the higher First Strike total will attack first.
es: El equipo que tenga el Primer Ataque total más alto atacará primero.
test_longest: L'équipe qui obtient le total de Première Frappe le plus élevé attaquera en premier.

ru: Let's see if our contestant can re-spin to get First Strike!
fr: Voyons si notre concurrent peut relancer pour avoir la Première Frappe !
en: Let's see if our contestant can re-spin to get First Strike!
sch: 来看看我们的参赛者能不能通过重组来获得首次突袭！
pt: Vamos ver se nosso participante pode girar novamente para obter o Primeiro Ataque!
tr: Let's see if our contestant can re-spin to get First Strike!
de: Lass uns schauen, ob unser Herausforderer mit einem erneuten Dreh einen Erstschlag erhält!
ko: Let's see if our contestant can re-spin to get First Strike!
it: Vediamo se i nostri concorrenti possono rilanciare per ottenere Primo Fuoco.
jp: Let's see if our contestant can re-spin to get First Strike!
tch: Let's see if our contestant can re-spin to get First Strike!
es: ¡Veamos si nuestro concursante consigue Primer Ataque girando de nuevo!
test_longest: Lass uns schauen, ob unser Herausforderer mit einem erneuten Dreh einen Erstschlag erhält!

ru: You've got the higher First Strike total!
fr: Vous avez le total de Première Frappe le plus élevé !
en: You've got the higher First Strike total!
sch: 你已获得了总数更高的首次突袭！
pt: Você obteve o maior Primeiro Ataque total!
tr: You've got the higher First Strike total!
ko: You've got the higher First Strike total!
it: Hai il più alto valore totale in Primo Fuoco.
jp: You've got the higher First Strike total!
tch: You've got the higher First Strike total!
es: Tienes el Primer Ataque total más alto.

ru: That means all your units get to attack first!

es: ¡Desata Bombardear para que llueva el infierno sobre tus enemigos!
test_longest: Scatena Bombarda e colpisci con una pioggia di proiettili tutti i tuoi nemici!

ru: Here are leagues. You can move up the ladder to earn new rewards!
fr: Voici les ligues. Vous pouvez grimper dans le classement pour obtenir de nouvelles récompenses !
en: Here are leagues. You can move up the ladder to earn new rewards!
sch: 这里是联盟。随着天梯名次的爬升你也将会获得新的奖励！
pt: Aqui estão as ligas. Você pode subir a ladeira para obter novas premiações!
tr: Here are leagues. You can move up the ladder to earn new rewards!
de: Das sind Ligen. Du kannst die Rangliste hinaufklettern, um neue Belohnungen zu erhalten!
ko: Here are leagues. You can move up the ladder to earn new rewards!
it: Qui ci sono i campionati. Puoi scalare la vetta per guadagnare nuovi premi!
jp: Here are leagues. You can move up the ladder to earn new rewards!
tch: Here are leagues. You can move up the ladder to earn new rewards!
es: Aquí están las ligas. ¡Sube en la escala para ganar nuevas recompensas!
test_longest: Voici les ligues. Vous pouvez grimper dans le classement pour obtenir de nouvelles récompenses !

ru: Companies are now willing to offer you contract endorsements!
fr: Des compagnies veulent maintenant vous offrir des contrats promotionnels !
en: Companies are now willing to offer you contract endorsements!
sch: 公司决定授予你一份契约！
pt: As empresas querem lhe oferecer propostas de contrato!
tr: Companies are now willing to offer you contract endorsements!
de: Unternehmen werden dir jetzt Verträge anbieten!
ko: Companies are now willing to offer you contract endorsements!
it: Le aziende sono ora disposte ad offrirti un contratto!
jp: Companies are now willing to offer you contract endorsements!
tch: Companies are now willing to offer you contract endorsements!
es: ¡Las empresas están ahora dispuestas a firmar contratos contigo!
test_longest: Des compagnies veulent maintenant vous offrir des contrats promotionnels !

ru: Choose a contract to get started. Some cost time but the best ones cost Gems.
fr: Sélectionnez un contrat pour commencer. Certains prennent du temps, mais les meilleurs coûtent des gemmes.
en: Choose a contract to get started. Some cost time but the best ones cost Gems.
sch: 选择一份契约并开始，大部分都只消耗时间，不过最好的将消耗宝石。
pt: Escolha um contrato para começar. Alguns custam tempo, mas os melhores custam Jóias.
tr: Choose a contract to get started. Some cost time but the best ones cost Gems.
de: Wähle einen Vertrag, um anzufangen. Einige kosten Zeit, aber die besten kosten Juwelen.
ko: Choose a contract to get started. Some cost time but the best ones cost Gems.
it: Scegli un contratto per iniziare. Alcuni costano tempo, ma per i migliori servono Gemme.
jp: Choose a contract to get started. Some cost time but the best ones cost Gems.
tch: Choose a contract to get started. Some cost time but the best ones cost Gems.
es: Elige un contrato para empezar. Algunos cuestan solo tiempo pero los mejores cuestan Gemas.
test_longest: Sélectionnez un contrat pour commencer. Certains prennent du temps, mais les meilleurs coûtent des gemmes.

ru: The free contracts can only be collected once in a while. Don't forget to come back!
fr: Les contrats gratuits peuvent être collectés régulièrement. N'oubliez pas de revenir !
en: The free contracts can only be collected once in a while. Don't forget to come back!
sch: 免费契约只有偶尔才会出现，所以别忘了常回来玩！
pt: Os contratos gratuitos somente podem ser coletados de vez em quando. Não se esqueça de voltar!
tr: The free contracts can only be collected once in a while. Don't forget to come back!
de: Die kostenlosen Verträge können nur in gewissen Zeitabständen gesammelt werden. Vergiss nicht vorbeizuschauen!
ko: The free contracts can only be collected once in a while. Don't forget to come back!
it: I contratti gratuiti possono essere sottoscritti di tanto in tanto. Torna a dare un'occhiata!
jp: The free contracts can only be collected once in a while. Don't forget to come back!
tch: The free contracts can only be collected once in a while. Don't forget to come back!
es: Los contratos gratis solo pueden realizarse de vez en cuando. ¡No olvides volver!
test_longest: Die kostenlosen Verträge können nur in gewissen Zeitabständen gesammelt werden. Vergiss nicht vorbeizuschauen!

ru: Hey Rookie, I didn't catch your name. Tap on the box and enter the name you want to go by.
fr: Hey le bleu, je n'ai pas compris ton nom. Touche la boîte et écris le nom que tu veux utiliser.
en: Hey Rookie, I didn't catch your name. Tap on the box and enter the name you want to go by.
sch: 嘿伙计，我还不知道你的名字呢。点击输入框来起个名字吧。
pt: Hei, calouro, eu nao sei o seu nome. Toque na caixa e introduza o nome que você quer usar.

jp: Hey Rookie, I didn't catch your name. Tap on the box and enter the name you want to go by.
tch: Hey Rookie, I didn't catch your name. Tap on the box and enter the name you want to go by.

test_longest: Hey le bleu, je n'ai pas compris ton nom. Touche la boîte et écris le nom que tu veux utiliser.

ru: Wow! Your wins have earned you a spot in the promotion series!
fr: Ouah ! Vos victoires vous ont obtenu une place dans la série de promotion !
en: Wow! Your wins have earned you a spot in the promotion series!
sch: 哇喔！你的胜利使你在晋升赛中更上了一步！

tch: Wow! Your wins have earned you a spot in the promotion series!

ru: During a promotion series, you must win 3 of your next 5 matches.
fr: Durant cette série de promotion, vous devez gagner 3 de vos 5 prochains matchs.
en: During a promotion series, you must win 3 of your next 5 matches.

ko: During a promotion series, you must win 3 of your next 5 matches.

tch: During a promotion series, you must win 3 of your next 5 matches.

ru: If you're successful, you'll be promoted to the next tier!

ru: Take center stage in an explosive winner-takes-all battle in Super Battle Tactics . Roll the dice to deal detrimental damage and take home the prize in this turn-based battle of brains and brawn. http://bit.ly/battletactics
fr: Prenez la scène dans une explosive bataille le-gagnant-gagne-tout dans Super Battle Tactics. Roulez le dé pour faire des dégâts préjudiciables et ramenez le prix à la maison dans cette bataille tour par tour.  http ://bit.ly/battletactics

ru: Rise of the Bandits is going on now: You and your Club can take on these ruthless bandits and earn Event Points for Limited Rewards! \n Time to prove your Dominance!
fr: La Révolte des Hors-la-loi fait rage : Vous et votre Club pouvez affronter ces bandits et gagner des Points d'Évènement pour des Récompenses Limitées ! \n Il est temps de prouver votre domination !
en: Rise of the Bandits is going on now: You and your Club can take on these ruthless bandits and earn Event Points for Limited Rewards! \n Time to prove your Dominance!
sch: 土匪正在崛起：与你的俱乐部一同清剿这些横行霸道的土匪，并获得可兑换限量奖励的事件点数！\n 证明自己的时候到了！
pt: A Revolta dos Foras-da-Lei está acontecendo agora: Participe de um clube para enfrentar esses bandidos impiedosos e ganhar Pontos de Eventos por Prêmios Limitados! \n Hora de provar sua dominância!

ru: THESE ABILITIES FIRE AFTER THE FIRST-STRIKE PHASE, BEFORE EITHER PLAYER'S COMBAT PHASE.
fr: CES POUVOIRS TIRENT APRÈS LA PHASE DE LA PREMIÈRE FRAPPE, AVANT LA PHASE DE COMBAT DE CHAQUE JOUEUR.
en: THESE ABILITIES FIRE AFTER THE FIRST-STRIKE PHASE, BEFORE EITHER PLAYER'S COMBAT PHASE.
sch: 这些技能将在首次突袭后和任一玩家行动前使用。
pt: ESTAS HABILIDADES DISPARAM APÓS A FASE DE PRIMEIRO ATAQUE, ANTES DA FASE DE COMBATE DOS JOGADORES.
tr: THESE ABILITIES FIRE AFTER THE FIRST-STRIKE PHASE, BEFORE EITHER PLAYER'S COMBAT PHASE.
de: DIESE FÄHIGKEITEN FEUERN NACH DEM ERSTSCHLAG, VOR DER KAMPF-PHASE.
ko: THESE ABILITIES FIRE AFTER THE FIRST-STRIKE PHASE, BEFORE EITHER PLAYER'S COMBAT PHASE.
it: QUESTE ABILITÀ SI ATTIVANO DOPO IL PRIMO FUOCO, PRIMA DELLA FASE DI BATTAGLIA DI CIASCUN GIOCATORE.
jp: THESE ABILITIES FIRE AFTER THE FIRST-STRIKE PHASE, BEFORE EITHER PLAYER'S COMBAT PHASE.
tch: THESE ABILITIES FIRE AFTER THE FIRST-STRIKE PHASE, BEFORE EITHER PLAYER'S COMBAT PHASE.
es: ESTAS HABILIDADES SE ACTIVAN DESPUÉS DE LA FASE DE PRIMER ATAQUE, ANTES DE LA FASE DE COMBATE DE CADA JUGADOR.
test_longest: ESTAS HABILIDADES SE ACTIVAN DESPUÉS DE LA FASE DE PRIMER ATAQUE, ANTES DE LA FASE DE COMBATE DE CADA JUGADOR.

ru: THESE ABILITIES OCCUR DURING A PLAYER'S ATTACK PHASE, BEFORE THEIR UNITS FIRE.
fr: CES POUVOIRS SE MANIFESTENT DURANT LA PHASE D'ATTAQUE DU JOUEUR, AVANT QUE SES UNITÉS NE TIRENT.
en: THESE ABILITIES OCCUR DURING A PLAYER'S ATTACK PHASE, BEFORE THEIR UNITS FIRE.
sch: 这些技能将在玩家单位刚要行动之前起效。
pt: ESTAS HABILIDADES OCORREM DURANTE A FASE DE ATAQUE DO JOGADOR, ANTES QUE SUAS UNIDADES DISPAREM.
tr: THESE ABILITIES OCCUR DURING A PLAYER'S ATTACK PHASE, BEFORE THEIR UNITS FIRE.
de: DIESE FÄHIGKEITEN ERSCHEINEN WÄHREND EINER SPIELERANGRIFFS-PHASE, BEVOR SEINE EINHEITEN FEUERN.
ko: THESE ABILITIES OCCUR DURING A PLAYER'S ATTACK PHASE, BEFORE THEIR UNITS FIRE.
it: QUESTE ABILITÀ SI ATTIVANO DURANTE LA FASE DI ATTACCO DI UN GIOCATORE, PRIMA CHE LE SUE UNITÀ SPARINO.

tch: THESE ABILITIES OCCUR DURING A PLAYER'S ATTACK PHASE, BEFORE THEIR UNITS FIRE.
es: ESTAS HABILIDADES OCURREN DURANTE LA FASE DE ATAQUE DE UN JUGADOR, ANTES DE QUE LAS UNIDADES DISPAREN.
test_longest: QUESTE ABILITÀ SI ATTIVANO DURANTE LA FASE DI ATTACCO DI UN GIOCATORE, PRIMA CHE LE SUE UNITÀ SPARINO.

ru: THESE ABILITIES COUNTER SPECIFIC OTHER ABILITIES, AND ARE ONLY REVEALED IF AND WHEN THOSE ABILITIES FIRE.
fr: CES POUVOIRS BLOQUENT D'AUTRES POUVOIRS SPÉCIFIQUES, ET SONT RÉVÉLÉS LORSQUE CES POUVOIRS FONT FEU.
en: THESE ABILITIES COUNTER SPECIFIC OTHER ABILITIES, AND ARE ONLY REVEALED IF AND WHEN THOSE ABILITIES FIRE.
sch: 这些技能用于反击其他技能，并且只在受到那些技能攻击的时候起效。
pt: ESTAS HABILIDADES SE OPÕEM A OUTRAS HABILIDADES ESPECÍFICAS, E SÃO REVELADAS SOMENTE SE, E QUANDO, ESTAS HABILIDADES SÃO DISPARADAS.
tr: THESE ABILITIES COUNTER SPECIFIC OTHER ABILITIES, AND ARE ONLY REVEALED IF AND WHEN THOSE ABILITIES FIRE.
de: DIESE FÄHIGKEITEN WIRKEN GEGENERISCHEN FÄHIGKEITEN ENTGEGEN UND ERSCHEINEN NUR, WENN DIE FEINDFÄHIGKEIT AKTIVIERT WIRD.
ko: THESE ABILITIES COUNTER SPECIFIC OTHER ABILITIES, AND ARE ONLY REVEALED IF AND WHEN THOSE ABILITIES FIRE.

sch: 宝石！花得时候可得小心点哦！

ru: Reporting in from the field. Welcome the combatants!

en: Reporting in from the field. Welcome the combatants!
sch: 我们的报道来自最前线。让我们欢迎参赛者！
pt: Direto do campo de batalha. Dêem as boas vindas aos combatentes!
tr: Reporting in from the field. Welcome the combatants!
de: Berichterstattung direkt vom Schauplatz. Begrüßen wir die Kämpfer!
ko: Reporting in from the field. Welcome the combatants!

jp: Reporting in from the field. Welcome the combatants!

test_longest: Berichterstattung direkt vom Schauplatz. Begrüßen wir die Kämpfer!

pt: E aqui está o seu competidor!

ru: Lets see who wins. Re-Spin to help your odds!
fr: Voyons qui gagne. Relancez afin d'augmenter vos chances.
en: Lets see who wins. Re-Spin to help your odds!
sch: 让我们瞧瞧谁能获得桂冠。重组可以提高你的胜算！
pt: Vamos ver quem ganha. Retorne para aumentar as suas chances!
tr: Lets see who wins. Re-Spin to help your odds!
de: Lasst uns sehen wer gewinnt. Drehe nochmal, um deine Gewinnchance zu erhöhen !
ko: Lets see who wins. Re-Spin to help your odds!
it: Chi sarà il vincitore? Rilancia per aumentare le probabilità!
jp: Lets see who wins. Re-Spin to help your odds!
tch: Lets see who wins. Re-Spin to help your odds!
es: Veamos quién gana. ¡Vuelve a girar para mejorar tu suerte!
test_longest: Lasst uns sehen wer gewinnt. Drehe nochmal, um deine Gewinnchance zu erhöhen !

ru: We've got a second tank ready for you.
fr: Nous avons un deuxième tank à votre disposition.
en: We've got a second tank ready for you.
sch: 我们为你准备了另一辆坦克。
pt: Temos um segundo tanque pronto para você.
tr: We've got a second tank ready for you.
de: Wir haben einen zweiten Panzer bereit für dich.
ko: We've got a second tank ready for you.
it: Abbiamo un secondo carro pronto per te.
jp: We've got a second tank ready for you.
tch: We've got a second tank ready for you.
es: Tenemos preparado un segundo tanque para ti.
test_longest: Nous avons un deuxième tank à votre disposition.

ru: Let's get back out there for more TANK TV combat!
fr: Retournons voir d'autres combats de TANK TV !
en: Let's get back out there for more TANK TV combat!
sch: 让我们转过来看看更多来自坦克电视台的精彩比赛！
pt: Vamos retornar para mais combates TANK TV!
tr: Let's get back out there for more TANK TV combat!
de: Lass und zurück nach draußen für mehr PANZER-TV-Kämpfe!
ko: Let's get back out there for more TANK TV combat!
it: Torniamo in onda per altre battaglie su PANZER TV!
jp: Let's get back out there for more TANK TV combat!
tch: Let's get back out there for more TANK TV combat!
es: ¡Volvamos ahí fuera para disfrutar de más combates en TANK TV!
test_longest: ¡Volvamos ahí fuera para disfrutar de más combates en TANK TV!

ru: Things are going to get harder so make sure you're focused.
fr: Les choses seront plus difficiles, assurez-vous donc d'être bien concentré.
en: Things are going to get harder so make sure you're focused.
sch: 接下来的战斗定将会越来越难，你必须更加专注。
pt: As coisas vão ficar mais difíceis, garanta que você esteja focado.
tr: Things are going to get harder so make sure you're focused.
de: Die Sache wird schwieriger, also stell sicher, dass du konzentriert bist.
ko: Things are going to get harder so make sure you're focused.
it: Il gioco si farà più duro, rimanete concentrati!
jp: Things are going to get harder so make sure you're focused.
tch: Things are going to get harder so make sure you're focused.
es: Las cosas se irán complicando, así que mantente concentrado.
test_longest: Les choses seront plus difficiles, assurez-vous donc d'être bien concentré.

ru: Hurry, we're ready to start the show. Pick a tank!
fr: Dépêchez-vous, nous sommes prêts à commencer le spectacle. Choisissez un tank !
en: Hurry, we're ready to start the show. Pick a tank!
sch: 快点，表演就要开始了，快选个坦克！
pt: Rápido, estamos prontos para o show. Escolha um tanque!
tr: Hurry, we're ready to start the show. Pick a tank!
de: Beeil dich! Wir sind bereit die Show zu starten, wähle einen Panzer!
ko: Hurry, we're ready to start the show. Pick a tank!
it: Sbrigati, siamo pronti per iniziare lo spettacolo. Scegli un carro!
jp: Hurry, we're ready to start the show. Pick a tank!
tch: Hurry, we're ready to start the show. Pick a tank!
es: ¡Date prisa, va a empezar el espectáculo! Elige un tanque.
test_longest: Dépêchez-vous, nous sommes prêts à commencer le spectacle. Choisissez un tank !

ru: LIVE! From the sold out battle arena...
fr: EN DIRECT ! De l'arène de combat pleine à craquer…
en: LIVE! From the sold out battle arena...
sch: 现场直播！来自座无虚席的竞技场……
pt: AO VIVO! Da arena de batalha lotada...
tr: LIVE! From the sold out battle arena...
ko: LIVE! From the sold out battle arena...
it: IN DIRETTA! Dalla tutta esaurita arena di battaglia...
jp: LIVE! From the sold out battle arena...
tch: LIVE! From the sold out battle arena...
es: ¡En directo! Desde la tan ansiada arena de combate...
test_longest: IN DIRETTA! Dalla tutta esaurita arena di battaglia...

ru: Everyone on your feet, this is TANK TV!
fr: Tout le monde debout, voici le TANK TV !
en: Everyone on your feet, this is TANK TV!
sch: 这是空前的盛会，这里是坦克电视台！
pt: Todos de pé, essa é a TANK TV!
tr: Everyone on your feet, this is TANK TV!
de: Alles auf die Beine, das ist PANZER-TV!
ko: Everyone on your feet, this is TANK TV!
it: Tutti in piedi, questa è PANZER TV!
jp: Everyone on your feet, this is TANK TV!
tch: Everyone on your feet, this is TANK TV!
es: ¡Preparados para la acción, esto es TANK TV!
test_longest: ¡Preparados para la acción, esto es TANK TV!

ru: Another gift! The most lucractive show on TV!
fr: Un autre cadeau ! L'émission de TV la plus lucrative !
en: Another gift! The most lucractive show on TV!
sch: 另一个礼物！简直是电视里最大的盛会！
pt: Outro presente! O programa mais lucrativo da TV!
tr: Another gift! The most lucractive show on TV!
de: Ein weiteres Geschenk! Die rentabelste Show im TV!
ko: Another gift! The most lucractive show on TV!
it: Un altro regalo! Lo show più redditizio della TV!
jp: Another gift! The most lucractive show on TV!
tch: Another gift! The most lucractive show on TV!
es: ¡Otro regalo! El programa de televisión más lucrativo.
test_longest: Un autre cadeau ! L'émission de TV la plus lucrative !

ru: That's a lot of cash. Great job on the show, kid!
fr: C'est beaucoup d'argent. Beau travail dans le spectacle, mon ami !
en: That's a lot of cash. Great job on the show, kid!
sch: 大一笔现金，干得漂亮宝贝儿！
pt: Isso é bastante grana. Bom trabalho, garoto!
tr: That's a lot of cash. Great job on the show, kid!
de: Das ist ne Menge Kohle! Großartige Arbeit in der Show!
ko: That's a lot of cash. Great job on the show, kid!
it: Questi sono tanti soldi. Ottimo lavoro, ragazzo!
jp: That's a lot of cash. Great job on the show, kid!
tch: That's a lot of cash. Great job on the show, kid!
es: ¡Eso es un montón de dinero! ¡Buen trabajo en el programa, chico!
test_longest: C'est beaucoup d'argent. Beau travail dans le spectacle, mon ami !

ru:
Welcome to the big-budget sports-spectacle of the future, kid! You're the main event!
 
To win in the Super Battle Tactics Arena you'll need strong tanks, some luck, and more than a little skill. Follow these simple tips and before long the fans will be chanting your name!

ru: These light tanks often have fewer Hit Points and deal less overall damage, but have more First Strike faces allowing you to get the jump on the enemy before they get their shots off on you. These guys often work very well with your Targeting ability so that you get the chance to take down a specific tank before he can even fight back!

ru: These utility tanks have high HP and come packed with a variety of versatile support abilities like Armor Buff, First Strike Buff, or Extinguish. They are usually also capable of dealing normal damage and come loaded with at least one First Strike face. In short, Defensive tanks are versatile work horses that can make your other tanks much better!

ru: Choppers are flying threats that combine the First-Strike capabilities of Speed Tanks with the high-end damage output of Assault Tanks. In addition, all Choppers have a chance to completely ignore the Area-of-Effect attacks like Napalm, Multi-Strike, and Bombard! The price you pay for fielding a Chopper is that they are generally the frailest vehicles on the battlefield, but in the right squad they are deadly!

ru:
As you progress through the tiers, you'll gain access to new tanks you can build with parts scavenged from the battlefield. Building is the best way to get the tanks you want, though it can take some time for them to be constructed, and you need to have the right number of parts for the tanks you want to build. The best tanks require cores specific to them.
 
Even if you don't need a specific tank, you get free battle tickets and cash for building them, and you get gems for building all the tanks in a given tier!

ru:
Abilities allow you, the tank commander, to affect combat in a variety of dramatic ways. Abilities are unlocked and upgraded as you rise through the tiers-almost every ability listed here has one (or more) better versions, but we only cover the ones that are functionally different from their lesser versions.
 
Every round you have three ability points to spend. Use your ability points wisely! Sometimes, investing in a stand-alone ability (like Jammer or Bombard) is more valuable than going for that re-spin.

Abilities allow you, the tank commander, to affect combat in a variety of dramatic ways. Abilities are unlocked and upgraded as you rise through the tiers-almost every ability listed here has one (or more) better versions, but we only cover the ones that are functionally different from their lesser versions.
 
Every round you have three ability points to spend. Use your ability points wisely! Sometimes, investing in a stand-alone ability (like Jammer or Bombard) is more valuable than going for that re-spin.

ru:
Targeting is best for focusing on a specific high-priority tank to be scrapped (a fast First-Strike tank or an Assault Tank with a powerful special, for example). Or, maybe you just want to remove one of your opponent's tanks so they are down one spinner on the following rounds. Whatever your strategy, an un-jammed Targeting can win games.
 
PROTIP: Your tanks attack in order from top to bottom, though specials (purple spinner faces) often go off first. By doing some quick math you can figure out the best enemy unit to target based on your tanks' spin results. Try to avoid "wasting" damage potential-dealing 30 damage to a tank with 2HP is a terrible overkill, and you may wish you had applied that damage elsewhere later in the fight.

ru: Works the same way as regular Targeting but can't be scrambled by Jammer and increases the damage of each attack by 1. This ability may costs twice the ability points as normal Targeting but it is much more likely to get the job done, and it can only be foiled by Jammer II or Draw Fire.

ru:
A staple ability for many squads, Re-spinning is the most commonly used ability in the game. Using the Re-Spin ability guarantees that tank's roll will land on a different spinner face than what it has now! However, you may end up with a worse result on a re-spin, so Re-Spin with care.
 
PROTIP: Spending a single ability point to activate a tank's special or get a high damage/first-strike result is an excellent investment, but ONLY if you get what you want. It's good to look past the current round to your overall strategy and ask what you WANT to have now versus what you NEED to have later to win the battle. The more you scrap, the more naturally you'll be able to answer these questions.

ru: Each Tank randomly rolls a value from its Attack Spinner each round. This value determines how much damage it will deal. Higher damage attacks and specials are usually further to the right on the Attack Spinner, so it can often be good to re-spin for the best attack!

ru: Mini Strike is a targeted laser that is great for finishing off an enemy or dealing some extra damage. Keep in mind that it deals 6-8 damage so using it on an enemy with 7 HP won't ensure a kill (and a tank with 1 hp can deal just as much damage as when it's got full hp!). Still, sometimes you just need a sky laser, and at two ability points Mini Strike can be a quick go-to ability for when the spins just aren't cooperating.

ru:
Bombarding costs 4 ability points meaning you have to invest points for more than one round before dealing damage to all enemy units. It's a powerful attack that can turn the tide of a fight, or continue the snowball you already have rolling.
 
PROTIP: If you can afford to invest Ability Points into Bombard during the first round, you may be setting your opponent up for a surprise in round two or three. Resist the urge to re-spin unless the success will be worth it, and (especially) if a failed re-spin will not be the end of you.

ru:
The Draw Fire ability gives a single unit a small boost to its armor and forces all standard and single-target tank specials to target that tank, keeping your other tanks (relatively) safe from harm. This is great for protecting specific tanks that you need to keep alive, though using this ability in round 1 is very risky because your tank has a good chance of being destroyed.

PROTIP: Jammer I does not stop Targeting II, but Draw Fire does!

ru: Re-Spin All functions much like the Re-Spin ability, but it re-spins all of your units and it still only costs 1 ability point. That single point can turn bad luck into good, but unlike Re-Spin you could get the same results, or (of course) even worse results. Use with care.

ru:
Sacrifice deals damage to all opponents at the cost of one of your tanks, which is destroyed in the process. The damage is a set value, so it's reliable, and it costs only 2 Ability Points! It can be risky to use, though, as your sacrificial tank can be destroyed before it is sacrificed. In this case, the ability does not go off and you've lost both of your ability points! 

PROTIP: Adding Sacrifice to a First-Strike Tank team makes for a potent combination. If the spins are kind you'll likely go first, guaranteeing that your sacrificial tank does his worst!

ru:
For when you absolutely positively need your opponent to avoid Targeting your tanks-Jammer II does the jobs of Jammer and even takes care of Targeting II, all while moving Overloads to random targets. 

PROTIP: For DoT squads, Jammer II is a must-have at the high-end to keep those pesky First-Strikers from Targeting down your tanks.

sch:
For when you absolutely positively need your opponent to avoid Targeting your tanks-Jammer II does the jobs of Jammer and even takes care of Targeting II, all while moving Overloads to random targets. 

PROTIP: For DoT squads, Jammer II is a must-have at the high-end to keep those pesky First-Strikers from Targeting down your tanks.

ru: Fire a bolt of electricity that deals 5 damage and eliminates the ability for that tank to Re-Spin the following round. he 5 damage can be nice for picking off those low-health tanks, but the secondary ability is great for strategically crippling high-priority targets.

ru:
Each tank has Hit Points (HP) that are lost when they are attacked. A tank that reaches zero Hit Points explodes in a shower of cash, scrap, and (if you're lucky) parts.
 
PROTIP: A tank is just as effective at 1 HP as it is at maximum HP, so keeping a tank alive (or conversely, allowing a weak tank to stay alive) does nothing to reduce its effectiveness. Go for the killing blow and try to keep your opponent from doing the same!

ru:
Firebomb  deals a small amount of damage and applies a small DOT (Damage Over Time) to all of the opponent's tanks. This damage stacks, and can make an enormous difference over the course of a few rounds, especially if used multiple times. 

PRO TIP: An effective strategy is to apply DOTs like Firebomb early and often, and tank through enemy damage while waiting for the enemy to burn to a crisp. Best used early in the fight.

ru: Get bonus cash for winning in style! This ability air-drops a small amount of bonus cash on the enemy (collectable by you once you win) and has no in-game effect, but it does bring shame to your enemy as you breeze through battle with that Cake Walk swagger (or, it brings great shame to you as they rally back and slap you down for wasting 3 ability points)!

ru:
Extinguish launches drones that lower the amount of damage being taken each round by Damage Over Time (DoT) effects like Napalm and Firebomb. After doing their job, the drones fly away, but subsequent Extinguishes put out additional fires.

PROTIP: Extinguish happens at the beginning of your turn, so if you're fighting a DoT Squad it may be best to lose First Strike so your Extinguish can take care of that pesky end-of-round damage.

ru: Intel provides important recon data on the opponent's squad, granting you between 1 and 5 free first-strike points that are air-dropped into the battle at the beginning of your turn. These points do nothing for your damage, but they can make the difference between going first, or not at all. It might be the edge you need.

ru: Many tanks have special abilities, or specials, that are activated when the purple spinner face with a star comes up. These specials have a variety of dramatic results, and along with Abilities and the understanding of how they all work together, they are the key to victory in the Super Battle Tactics Arena.

ru:
Armor Buff applies a certain amount of temporary armor (additional HP) to your entire squad. This armor is lost first as you are attacked, making Armor Buff the natural enemy and nullifier of Multi-Strike. 

PROTIP: If you're having trouble with First Strike squads, get a tank with Armor Buff AND use Jammer to spread their damage out. This will keep your tanks alive long enough to strike back at those speedy, but fragile, First-Strike squads.

ru: HotShot deals initial damage and applies a DoT (Damage Over Time) that is equally powerful to the target tank, dealing that damage to the target at the end of every round (including the first). Unless the target is extinguished (or the fight ends), they will quickly burn down and explode.

ru: Rail Guns are super-powered, single-target attacks that deal massive damage. They are so powerful that they require a full round to deploy before they can be used, so you need to roll the special multiple times (once to deploy, and once for each successive shot), but the payoff can be well worth it as few tanks can withstand a blast from a Rail Gun.

ru:
Extinguish launches drones that lower the amount of damage being taken each round by Damage Over Time (DoT) effects like Napalm and Firebomb. After doing their job, the drones fly away, but subsequent Extinguishes put out additional fires. 

PROTIP: Extinguish happens at the beginning of your turn, so if you're fighting a DoT Squad it may be best to lose First Strike so your Extinguish can take care of that pesky end-of-round damage.

ru: Passive Specials are qualities that certain tanks have that are activated automatically under specific circumstances. The list is very short for now, but look for more Passive Specials to provide more metagame options for you Scrappers soon!

ru:
Evade provides a base chance for a given unit to completely ignore any Area of Effect (AoE) attack, including Napalm, Firebomb, Bombard, Sacrifice and Multi-Strike.

PROTIP: Avoiding the initial hit from a Damage over Time (DoT) attack also ignores any damage that would have followed, making tanks with Evade the natural enemy of Napalm tanks, though they are still highly susceptible to HotShot and normal attacks.

ru:
Contracts are sponsorships from various Tank TV weapons manufacturers. Outside of scrapping tanks on the battlefield, contracts are the easiest way for you to get cash, gems, and parts, and sometimes you'll even nab free tanks! 

Some contracts are free and can be claimed every day, but the best ones cost gems!

ru:
This contract is much more generous with parts, cash, and gems, but it also provides rare parts and even (rarely) Super Rare tanks! It takes 12 hours to refresh.

PRO TIP: If you time it right by activating this in the morning and before you go to bed, you can do 2 of these a day.

ru: Click the FAST FORWARD? button on either free contract to watch an ad from our sponsors and to speed through four hours of the contract's cool-down period. The FREE PRIZES contract has a total cool-down of four hours, and the FREE RARE PRIZES contract has a cool-down of 12 hours. You can watch up to nine ads per day, which equates to tons of free cash, scrap, steel, and parts!

ru:
Drop 'n Swap allows you to spend a few gems to trade an unwanted Super Rare core for another Super Rare core--hopefully the one you want. You get to choose the core you want and drop it into the center of the Drop 'N Swap game board. The other cores are randomly assigned, so all you have to do is pay the gem cost, drop the unwanted Super Rare core in the top of the game board, and cross your fingers! 

Drop 'N Swap is a great way to get cores that you would otherwise need to hunt and scrap for over a very long time.

The other cores are randomly assigned, so all you have to do is pay the gem cost, drop the unwanted Super Rare core in the top of the game board, and cross your fingers! 

Drop 'N Swap is a great way to get cores that you would otherwise need to hunt and scrap for over a very long time.

ru: Every round you have three ability points to spend. They can be invested in the abilities you have equipped, which allow you to affect the battlefield in different tactical ways. Use your ability points wisely! Sometimes investing in a high-cost ability is more valuable than going for that re-spin, but you gotta weigh the pros and cons!

ru: Events are generally the result of the Super Battle Arena being regularly infiltrated by outside forces. Wasteland bandits, inexplicably evolving dinosaurian tanks, tank/demon hybrids seemingly summoned from the great beyond--The Network will spare no expense in bringing loyal treadheads a taste of excitement, and you Scrappers always deliver! Remember, YOU are the main event!

ru: Destroying tanks during Point Battle events gets you points, and event-specific Elite tanks (which are stat-boosted during the event) earn you even more points. Event-specific parts drop from tanks destroyed throughout the event, or you can get a jump on the competition by getting a premium contract targeted at event elites.

ru:
There are a few truths any good Scrapper needs to accept about Mega Bosses.
1. A battle with all but the weakest Mega Bosses will usually end with your tanks lying in heaps of smoking scrap.
2. This is okay. Keep calm and scrap on.
3. When a Mega Boss you discover survives the battle with you (and this will happen a lot) an open bounty for that boss is automatically shared with other Scrappers, giving preference to your club mates.

ru: While red spinner squares are strictly damage, blue spinner squares deal damage AND count towards who goes first. If your blue spinner faces add up to a higher total than your enemy's, you go first. Otherwise it's a coin-toss. Literally.

ru: If you lose first strike, you go second in that round, which is called a Counter Attack. Depending on your strategy it may be better to go first or second, but remember that few strategies survive the loss of your tanks! Or in other words, if the opponent goes first, it can mean trouble for your squad.

ru: Tanks come in a variety of shapes, sizes, and flavors, and even Choppers (helicopters) are a type of tank. There are many strategies to pursue with different types of tanks, and nothing is guaranteed, but the best squads tend to bring a mixture of firepower, defense, speed, and utility to deal with multiple types of threats.

ru: Assault Tanks are designed to deal damage to the enemy squad. They are often beefy and pack a big punch. They are sometimes low-frills, but might also be a high priority to take out since opponents don't want to get hit by their strong attacks. Assault Tanks may have unique Special Attacks that set enemy tanks on fire or damage all the opponent's tanks with a single attack!

ru: Firebomb damage-over-time will stack if you use the ability more than once. Try to multiply the damage!

pt: Unidades Raras e Super Raras podem ser promovidas para o nível 10!
tr: Rare and Super Rare units can be promoted to level 10!
de: Seltene und superseltene Einheiten können bis Level 10 aufgewertet werden!
ko: Rare and Super Rare units can be promoted to level 10!
it: Unità Rare e Super Rare possono essere portate al livello 10.
jp: Rare and Superrare units can be promoted to level 10!
tch: Rare and Super Rare units can be promoted to level 10!
es: ¡Las unidades Raras y Superraras pueden subir hasta el nivel 10!
test_longest: Seltene und superseltene Einheiten können bis Level 10 aufgewertet werden!

ru: Units fire in order from the top down, something to keep in mind when choosing which enemy to target.
fr: L'ordre de tir des unités est de haut en bas. Il est bon de s'en rappeler lorsqu'on choisit quel ennemi frapper.
en: Units fire in order from the top down, something to keep in mind when choosing which enemy to target.
sch: 单位的火力是由高到低排列的，所以在选择攻击哪个敌人的时候要想着点。
pt: Unidades atiram de cima para baixo, algo para se ter em mente quando escolher em qual inimigo mirar.
tr: Units fire in order from the top down, something to keep in mind when choosing which enemy to target.
de: Einheiten feuern der Reihe nach von oben nach unten, etwas das beachtet werden sollte, wenn ein Feind zum Ziel gewählt wird.
ko: Units fire in order from the top down, something to keep in mind when choosing which enemy to target.
it: Le unità sparano in ordine dall'alto verso il basso. Qualcosa da tenere a mente quando si sceglie il bersaglio nemico.
jp: Units fire in order from the top down, something to keep in mind when choosing which enemy to target.
tch: Units fire in order from the top down, something to keep in mind when choosing which enemy to target.
es: Las unidades disparan en un orden de arriba hacia abajo. Es algo importante a tener en cuenta al atacar.
test_longest: Einheiten feuern der Reihe nach von oben nach unten, etwas das beachtet werden sollte, wenn ein Feind zum Ziel gewählt wird.

ru: Attack Buffs only applies to red Attack spinner faces, not blue First Strike or Special attacks.
fr: Les boosts d'attaque ne s'appliquent qu'aux lanceurs attaquants rouges, mais pas aux premières frappes bleues ni aux attaques spéciales.
en: Attack Buffs only applies to red Attack spinner faces, not blue First Strike or Special attacks.
sch: 攻击增益效果只会由红色显示，并非蓝色的首次突袭或其他特殊攻击。
pt: Os Reforços de ataque somente se aplicam aos lados vermelhos de ataque da roleta, não aos azuis de primeiro ataque ou ataques especiais.
tr: Attack Buffs only applies to red Attack spinner faces, not blue First Strike or Special attacks.
de: Angriffsverstärkungen wirken nur auf rote Drehfelder, nicht auf blaue Erstschlags- oder Spezialangriffsdrehfelder.
ko: Attack Buffs only applies to red Attack spinner faces, not blue First Strike or Special attacks.
it: Incremento Attacco si applica solamente alle facce d'attacco rosse, non a quelle Primo Fuoco blu o d'Attacco speciale.
jp: Attack Buffs only applies to red Attack spinner faces, not blue First Strike or Special attacks.
tch: Attack Buffs only applies to red Attack spinner faces, not blue First Strike or Special attacks.
es: Los Refuerzos de Ataque se aplican solo a las caras giratorias rojas, no a las caras azules de Primer Ataque ni a los ataques especiales.
test_longest: Los Refuerzos de Ataque se aplican solo a las caras giratorias rojas, no a las caras azules de Primer Ataque ni a los ataques especiales.

ru: On a win streak? Cake Walk gives you extra cash for a win and does massive damage to your opponent's ego.
fr: Vous vous sentez en veine ? Jeu d'enfant vous donne un bonus d'argent lors d'une victoire et inflige d'importants dégâts à l'ego de votre adversaire.
en: On a win streak? Cake Walk gives you extra cash for a win and does massive damage to your opponent's ego.
sch: 在连胜中呢？木偶步可为你的胜利提供额外的现金作为奖励，并且对你的对手造成相当大的伤害。
pt: Em uma sequência de vitórias? Café com leite lhe dá grana extra pela vitória e causa dano massivo no ego do oponente.
tr: On a win streak? Cake Walk gives you extra cash for a win and does massive damage to your opponent's ego.
de: Hast du eine Siegesserie? Kinderspiel gibt dir extra Bares und zerstört das Ego deines Gegners.
ko: On a win streak? Cake Walk gives you extra cash for a win and does massive damage to your opponent's ego.
it: Stai ottenendo una serie di vittorie? Gioco Da Ragazzi fornisce denaro extra per una vittoria e infligge ingenti danni all'ego dell'avversario.
jp: On a win streak? Cake Walk gives you extra cash for a win and does massive damage to your opponent's ego.
tch: On a win streak? Cake Walk gives you extra cash for a win and does massive damage to your opponent's ego.
es: ¿En racha de victorias? La habilidad Bonus te da dinero extra por una victoria e inflige daño masivo al ego de tu oponente.
test_longest: Vous vous sentez en veine ? Jeu d'enfant vous donne un bonus d'argent lors d'une victoire et inflige d'importants dégâts à l'ego de votre adversaire.

ru: Sometimes the best offense is a good defense. Don't forget the defensive abilities!
fr: Parfois, la meilleure attaque est une bonne défense. N'oubliez pas d'utiliser vos pouvoirs d'armure !
en: Sometimes the best offense is a good defense. Don't forget the defensive abilities!
sch: 有时进攻就是最好的防守，但也别忘了那些防御能力！
pt: Algumas vezes o melhor ataque é a defesa. Não esqueça das habilidades defensivas!
tr: Sometimes the best offense is a good defense. Don't forget the defensive abilities!
de: Manchmal ist eine gute Defensive die beste Offensive. Vergiss nicht die Verteidigungsfähigkeiten.
ko: Sometimes the best offense is a good defense. Don't forget the defensive abilities!
it: A volte la difesa è il miglior attacco. Non dimenticarti delle abilità difensive.
jp: Sometimes the best offense is a good defense. Don't forget the defensive abilities!
tch: Sometimes the best offense is a good defense. Don't forget the defensive abilities!
es: A veces el mejor ataque es una buena defensa. ¡No te olvides de las habilidades defensivas!
test_longest: Parfois, la meilleure attaque est une bonne défense. N'oubliez pas d'utiliser vos pouvoirs d'armure !

ru: When enemy units are killed in Battle, they drop parts. The more you battle, the more parts you will get!
fr: Lorsque les unités ennemies sont tuées au cours d'une bataille, elles laissent tomber des pièces. Plus vous combattez, plus vous obtenez de pièces.
en: When enemy units are destroyed in Battle, they drop parts. The more you battle, the more parts you will get!
sch: 战斗中被干掉的敌人将会掉落零件，仗打得越多，你获得零件的几率也就越高！
pt: Quando unidades inimigas são mortas em batalha, elas deixam cair peças. Quanto mais batalhar, mais peças terá!
tr: When enemy units are killed in Battle, they drop parts. The more you battle, the more parts you will get!
de: Zerstörte Feindeinheiten lassen Teile fallen. Je mehr du besiegst, desto mehr Teile erhältst du.
ko: When enemy units are killed in Battle, they drop parts. The more you battle, the more parts you will get!
it: Quando le unità nemiche vengono uccise in Battaglia, rilasciano parti. Più combatti, più parti otterrai.
jp: When enemy units are killed in Battle, they drop parts. The more you battle, the more parts you will get!
tch: When enemy units are killed in Battle, they drop parts. The more you battle, the more parts you will get!
es: Cuando destruyes unidades enemigas en una batalla, estas dejan partes. ¡Cuanto más luches, más partes conseguirás!
test_longest: Lorsque les unités ennemies sont tuées au cours d'une bataille, elles laissent tomber des pièces. Plus vous combattez, plus vous obtenez de pièces.

ru: Suffering from a FIRE effect? Armor abilities can soak up all of that damage before your tanks are harmed.
fr: Vous souffrez de l'effet du FEU ? Les  pouvoirs d'armure peuvent absorber tous ces dégâts avant que les tanks ne soient touchés.
en: Suffering from a FIRE effect? Armor abilities can soak up all of that damage before your tanks are harmed.
sch: 饱受火力摧残么？护甲能力可以让你的坦克吸收尽可能多的伤害。
pt: Sofrendo de um efeito de FOGO? As habilidades de proteção podem absorver todo esse dano antes do seus tanques serem danificados.
tr: Suffering from a FIRE effect? Armor abilities can soak up all of that damage before your tanks are harmed.
de: Nimmst du Schaden durch einen Feuereffekt? Panzerungsfähigkeiten können Schaden völlig kompensieren, bevor deine Panzer beschädigt werden.
ko: Suffering from a FIRE effect? Armor abilities can soak up all of that damage before your tanks are harmed.
it: Stai soffrendo dell'effetto FUOCO?  Le abilità di difesa possono assorbire tutto il danno prima che i tuoi carri vengano danneggiati.
jp: Suffering from a FIRE effect? Armor abilities can soak up all of that damage before your tanks are harmed.
tch: Suffering from a FIRE effect? Armor abilities can soak up all of that damage before your tanks are harmed.
es: ¿Estás sufriendo efectos de FUEGO? Las habilidades de armadura absorberán el daño antes de que este se produzca.
test_longest: Nimmst du Schaden durch einen Feuereffekt? Panzerungsfähigkeiten können Schaden völlig kompensieren, bevor deine Panzer beschädigt werden.

ru: It often pays off to focus down single targets, but targeting is easily countered... don't rely on it.
fr: Il est souvent avantageux de se concentrer sur une seule cible, mais il est aussi facile de contrer un ciblage… il ne faut pas s'y fier.
en: It often pays off to focus down single targets, but targeting is easily countered... don't rely on it.
sch: 集火一个目标总是好的，不过瞄准能力也很容易被针对…所以也别太依赖它。
pt: Vale a pena focar-se com frequência em alvos únicos, mas o alvo é facilmente contra-atacado... Não dependa disso.
tr: It often pays off to focus down single targets, but targeting is easily countered... don't rely on it.
de: Es lohnt sich oft sich einzelne Ziele vorzunehmen aber die Zielerfassung ist leicht zu unterbrechen ... verlass dich nicht darauf.
ko: It often pays off to focus down single targets, but targeting is easily countered... don't rely on it.
it: Spesso vale la pena concentrarsi su un singolo obiettivo, ma il bersagliamento può essere spesso contrastato facilmente... Non fidarti troppo.
jp: It often pays off to focus down single targets, but targeting is easily countered... don't rely on it.
tch: It often pays off to focus down single targets, but targeting is easily countered... don't rely on it.
es: A veces vale la pena centrarse en algún objetivo, pero Apuntar es fácil de contrarrestar. No te confíes.
test_longest: Spesso vale la pena concentrarsi su un singolo obiettivo, ma il bersagliamento può essere spesso contrastato facilmente... Non fidarti troppo.

ru: Sell your old tanks for cash.
fr: Vendez vos anciens tanks pour obtenir de l'argent.
en: Sell your old tanks for cash.
sch: 你可以卖掉老旧的坦克来换些现金。
tr: Sell your old tanks for cash.
de: Verkaufe deinen alten Panzer für bare Münze.
ko: Sell your old tanks for cash.
it: Vendi i tuoi vecchi carri per ottenere denaro.
jp: Sell your old tanks for cash.
tch: Sell your old tanks for cash.
es: Vende tus tanques viejos por dinero.
test_longest: Vendez vos anciens tanks pour obtenir de l'argent.

ru: Ability points can be invested in abilities over multiple rounds.
fr: LES POINTS DE POUVOIR PEUVENT ÊTRE INVESTIS DANS DES POUVOIRS SUR PLUSIEURS TOURS.
en: Ability points can be invested in abilities over multiple rounds.
sch: 你可以在多个回合中一直给某一能力投入点数。
pt: Pontos de habilidade podem ser investidos em habilidades ao longo de múltiplas rodadas.
tr: Ability points can be invested in abilities over multiple rounds.
de: Fähigkeitspunkte können über mehrere Runden für Fähigkeiten eingesetzt werden.
ko: Ability points can be invested in abilities over multiple rounds.
it: I punti abilità possono essere investiti sulle abilità in più turni.
jp: Ability points can be invested in abilities over multiple rounds.
tch: Ability points can be invested in abilities over multiple rounds.
es: Los puntos de habilidad pueden gastarse en habilidades durante varias rondas.
test_longest: Pontos de habilidade podem ser investidos em habilidades ao longo de múltiplas rodadas.

ru: Special attacks like Napalm win battles. Prioritize targets with white stars in their spinners.
fr: Les attaques spéciales comme le Napalm gagnent des batailles. Priorisez les cibles qui ont des étoiles blanches.
en: Special attacks like Napalm win battles. Prioritize targets with white stars in their spinners.
sch: 特殊的攻击诸如凝固汽油弹可将比赛带向胜利，所以要优先考虑对手那些带有白色星星的目标。
pt: Ataques Especiais, como o Napalm, vencem batalhas. Priorize alvos com estrelas brancas em suas roletas.
tr: Special attacks like Napalm win battles. Prioritize targets with white stars in their spinners.
de: Spezialangriffe wie Napalm gewinnen Schlachten. Bevorzuge Ziele mit weißen Sternen in ihren Drehfeldern.
ko: Special attacks like Napalm win battles. Prioritize targets with white stars in their spinners.
it: Attacchi speciali come il Napalm, fanno vincere le battaglie. Dai priorità ai bersagli che hanno le stelle bianche sulla loro barra.
jp: Special attacks like Napalm win battles. Prioritize targets with white stars in their spinners.
tch: Special attacks like Napalm win battles. Prioritize targets with white stars in their spinners.
es: Los ataques especiales como Napalm ganan batallas. Da prioridad a los objetivos con estrellas blancas en sus bandas giratorias.
test_longest: Attacchi speciali come il Napalm, fanno vincere le battaglie. Dai priorità ai bersagli che hanno le stelle bianche sulla loro barra.

ru: If you want control of a battle's pace, take out their first-strikers and field your own.
fr: Si vous voulez contrôler le rythme de la bataille, éliminez les ennemis capables de première frappe et déployez les vôtres.
en: If you want control of a battle's pace, take out their first-strikers and field your own.
sch: 如果你想要主宰比赛，当心对手的首次突袭并好好布置你自己的。
pt: Se você deseja o controle de uma batalha, acabe com os primeiros ataques dos inimigos e ganhe espaço.
tr: If you want control of a battle's pace, take out their first-strikers and field your own.
de: Willst du den Ausgang einer Schlacht kontrollieren, vernichte zuerst die Erstschlag-Einheiten und setze dann deine ein.
ko: If you want control of a battle's pace, take out their first-strikers and field your own.
it: Se vuoi avere il controllo della battaglia, elimina le unità più pericolose, e prepara le tue.
jp: If you want control of a battle's pace, take out their first-strikers and field your own.
tch: If you want control of a battle's pace, take out their first-strikers and field your own.
es: Si quieres tener el control de la batalla, destruye primero sus unidades de Primer Ataque y despliega las tuyas.
test_longest: Si vous voulez contrôler le rythme de la bataille, éliminez les ennemis capables de première frappe et déployez les vôtres.

ru: Use the Jammer ability to cancel enemies using targeting.
fr: Utilisez le pouvoir de Diffusion pour annuler le Ciblage des ennemis.
en: Use the Jammer ability to cancel enemies using targeting.
sch: 使用干扰能力来阻止敌方的瞄准。
pt: Use a habilidade Jammer para cancelar os inimigos que usam Alvo.
tr: Use the Jammer ability to cancel enemies using targeting.
de: Benutze die Störsenderfähigkeit, um Feindzielerfassung abzubrechen.
ko: Use the Jammer ability to cancel enemies using targeting.
it: Utilizza l'abilità Immunità per neutralizzare i nemici che usano il Bersagliamento.
jp: Use the Jammer ability to cancel enemies using targeting.
tch: Use the Jammer ability to cancel enemies using targeting.
es: Usa la habilidad Bloquear para impedir a los enemigos usar Apuntar.
test_longest: Utilizza l'abilità Immunità per neutralizzare i nemici che usano il Bersagliamento.

ru: Drawfire ability is very risky to use in the first round.
fr: L'utilisation du pouvoir Capteur de Feu est très risqué lors du premier tour.
en: Drawfire ability is very risky to use in the first round.
sch: 在第一回合就使用吸引火力能力是比较危险的。
pt: A habilidade Cessar Fogo é muito arriscada de se usar na primeira rodada.
tr: Drawfire ability is very risky to use in the first round.
de: Der Einsatz der Ablenkung in der ersten Schlachtrunde ist sehr riskant.
ko: Drawfire ability is very risky to use in the first round.
it: L'abilità Attrazione è molto rischiosa da utilizzare al primo turno.
jp: Drawfire ability is very risky to use in the first round.
tch: Drawfire ability is very risky to use in the first round.
es: Es arriesgado usar la habilidad Atraer en la primera ronda.
test_longest: L'utilisation du pouvoir Capteur de Feu est très risqué lors du premier tour.

ru: Finish building units of the same tier to earn big rewards!
fr: Complétez la construction d'unités de même rang pour obtenir une grosse récompense.
en: Finish building units of the same tier to earn big rewards!
sch: 将当前阶层中的所有坦克制造完成即可获得一份大奖！
pt: Termine de construir unidades do mesmo nível para obter grandes premiações!
tr: Finish building units of the same tier to earn big rewards!
de: Beende den Bau von Einheiten eines Ranges, um große Belohnungen zu erhalten.
ko: Finish building units of the same tier to earn big rewards!
it: Finisci di costruire unità della stessa classe per ottenere grossi premi!
jp: Finish building units of the same tier to earn big rewards!
tch: Finish building units of the same tier to earn big rewards!
es: ¡Construye todos los tanques del mismo rango para obtener grandes recompensas!
test_longest: Complétez la construction d'unités de même rang pour obtenir une grosse récompense.

ru: Upgrading a unit to the highest level will change the tank's look!
fr: Améliorer une unité jusqu'au plus haut niveau modifiera l'apparence du tank !
en: Upgrading a unit to the highest level will change the tank's look!
sch: 将坦克升到最高级即可改变它的外观！
pt: Atualizar uma unidade ao nível mais alto irá mudar o visual do tanque!
tr: Upgrading a unit to the highest level will change the tank's look!
de: Einheitsaufwertung zum höchsten Rang, verändert das Aussehen des Panzers!
ko: Upgrading a unit to the highest level will change the tank's look!
it: Aggiornando un'unità fino al livello più alto cambierà l'aspetto del carro!
jp: Upgrading a unit to the highest level will change the tank's look!
tch: Upgrading a unit to the highest level will change the tank's look!
es: ¡Si mejoras una unidad hasta su nivel máximo, cambiará la apariencia del tanque!
test_longest: ¡Si mejoras una unidad hasta su nivel máximo, cambiará la apariencia del tanque!

ru: Claiming a built tank will provide a battle ticket.
fr: Réclamer un tank construit procure un billet pour une bataille.
en: Claiming a built tank will provide a battle ticket.
sch: 领取一个制造过的坦克将可提供一张门票。
pt: Resgatar um tanque construído irá fornecer um bilhete de batalha.
tr: Claiming a built tank will provide a battle ticket.
de: Anforderung eines gebauten Panzers gewährt ein Kampfticket.
ko: Claiming a built tank will provide a battle ticket.

jp: Claiming a built tank will provide a battle ticket.
tch: Claiming a built tank will provide a battle ticket.

pt: Por favor, tente novamente mais tarde.

ru:
Dealing damage to Mega Bosses earns you points, and if you deal enough damage to reach the damage threshold, you earn bonus goods. Dealing more damage than everyone else earns you an impressive cache of MVP bonus points. Discovering a Mega Boss--even if (when) it crushes you without noticing you screaming under its treads--earns you some points, too. You collect your points by CLAIMING them from your Bounty Board, so be sure to visit it often to see what’s available to battle. But here’s the catch:
You ONLY earn those delicious points if the Mega Boss is defeated!
This is VERY IMPORTANT. If a Mega Boss survives attention from you Scrappers for long enough after being discovered, it escapes, and EVERYONE who stood to gain points from it gets nothing but heartache and shame.

ru:
So how do you succeed in a Mega Boss event? It’s all about resource management. You want to make every ticket you spend give you the greatest point opportunity. That means sharing bosses with club mates (you get additional tickets for claiming defeated bosses that you and your club mates have attacked), surviving long enough to deal enough damage to earn that sweet MVP bonus, and keeping an eye on your Bounty Board for Mega Bosses you can snipe--you get a bunch of loot for destroying a Mega Boss!
So that's pretty much it; get in, get out, get your points, and GL HF!

ru: Whenever you battle against a live enemy your Elo Rating is on the line. SBT match-making will set you up with other players who have a similar rating (within a few hundred points), however the player with the higher Elo rating will have more Elo on the line! The higher your Elo rating is, the higher your Global Ranking will be. Climb your way to the top for big prizes!

ru: Every time you battle, you are earning progression towards the next tier. Winning gets you more points, and each time you fill up the tier progression bar you will unlock a Promotion Series. Win three out of five Promotion matches in order to advance to the next tier.

ru: Clubs are small groups of up to four Scrappers like you, working together to out-compete other clubs for points and glory! Club members pool their points together during events and will be able to earn additional rewards for each other, just for being active competitors on Tank TV!
